## Checklist
* [ ] **Build**
  * Version sync `make check-version`, Zig/Wasm build `make build-wasm`, TS build `make build-ts` OK
* [ ] **Test**
  * All tests pass `make test` + `omni report` verified 
* [ ] **Release Ready**
  * No telemetry, data local, docs updated, `make verify` passed
